message:
feat(ufunc): add precision guards for Vec<f64> storage bridge conversions

Add fail-closed validation for the temporary Vec<f64> storage bridge to
reject complex/string/structured dtypes and detect precision loss for
i64/u64 values exceeding 2^53. Ensures exact round-trip fidelity for
temporal and large-integer dtype conversions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
